haiku45.summary_excerpt: CRITICAL: Task explicitly required TDD with bats tests, sample fixtures (JUnit XML + JSON files), and ALL tests running through act with act-result.txt artifact. MISSING: (1) No test file (*.bats), (2) No test fixtures, (3) Workflow doesn't run tests or create act-result.txt, (4) No actionlint validation step, (5) No fixture setup in workflow. Script issues: parse_junit() uses fragile awk/sed regex (lines 28-49) without test coverage — unmaintainable without unit tests. aggregate.sh lacks error

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Excellent modular Bash implementation using TSV pipelines. GHA workflow is robust with least-privilege permissions and syntax validation. Script follows all shell best practices (set -euo pipefail, sourcing guards). Regex-based XML parsing (lines 20-43) is the only minor fragility point.
